reviews.comment:
Paso obligado cada vez que viajo al sur. Muy buena atención, baños siempre limpios y el bar muy completo.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop every time I travel south. Excellent service, always clean restrooms, and a well-stocked bar.

reviews.comment:
Es completa para el auto y para el viajero. Inclusive tiene un pequeño parque arbolado, con asadores, muy acogedor di se quiere hacer una etapa distendida

(Translated by Google)
It's perfect for both the car and the traveler. It even has a small, wooded park with barbecue grills, very inviting if you want to enjoy a relaxing stop.

reviews.comment:
Cuando venis de cualquier lugar al sur de sierra grande,como nosotros q veniamos de Ushuaia. Recorda q esta el la ultima estacion donde los combustibles salen un poco mas barato.

(Translated by Google)
When you're coming from anywhere south of Sierra Grande, like we were coming from Ushuaia, remember that it's the last station where fuel is a little cheaper.
